title: Mini tools
description: Make tools a little bit smaller for better visibility
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ad34a2e098f924f00be879cb578996aede4557_0.webp)
## Mini tools make Small items Like: All swords, All pickaxe, All shovels, All hoes, All axes, Shears, Flint and steel, Mace, Bow.
Except crossbow and Trident because for me its already small. 
If u tired of standart tools and wanna try something new but keep vanilla style this is nice option for you🙂. Its also for better visibility in Pvpツ (Standart size 68, 68, 68 with resource pack 48, 48, 48)

[Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00f3a59f9b388987e2195bb604bc3766b958e62b_0.webp)

[![SparkedHost](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1460304641236668511/1461763448441405532/Artboard_3.png?ex=696bbccc&is=696a6b4c&hm=e337c59f0d19fe2de554a07f4c371d8f6c815247c4ca690bb132b334efe231e9&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3089)
